# PSNR-HVS-M source

- Upstream page: https://www.ponomarenko.info/psnrhvsm.htm
- Source file: https://www.ponomarenko.info/psnrhvsm.m
- Retrieved: 2026-06-24
- Copyright: Nikolay Ponomarenko, 2006

The original MATLAB source is retained for auditability. Its embedded license
permits use, copying, and modification for educational and research purposes
without fee, provided that the copyright notice and authors' names remain.

The executable Python implementation in `metrics/psnr_hvs_m.py` is a direct
NumPy/SciPy port. It preserves the original CSF and masking matrices, 8x8
orthonormal DCT, masking equations, and default block step.

`tests/test_image_quality.py` also checks four fixed cases against values
generated by the original MATLAB code under Octave and published by the
independent `iqa-rs` project:
https://github.com/justin13888/iqa-rs/blob/ed0b7b53d0bbdfbd99aad640ae4883e77ac8c756/tests/psnr_hvs_m_reference.rs
